title: - [ ] Enable repository traffic analytics.
content:
- [ ] Enable repository traffic analytics.
- [ ] Manage stale issues and pull requests:
- Use GitHub Actions or bots to close stale issues/PRs.

---

### **10. Miscellaneous**
- [ ] Configure organization-wide policies for repositories.
- [ ] Add pinned repositories to the organization profile.
- [ ] Create team-specific wikis for documentation.
- [ ] Set up organization billing and payments.

---

This checklist should serve as a comprehensive guide to setting up your GitHub organization and repositories effectively. Let me know if you’d like detailed steps for any part of the checklist!
context: From document: ### Checklist for Setting Up a GitHub Organization and Repository — chunk 5 (chunk 5/5)
